era: Lo-Fi Punk. E=5 -- fast, catchy, deliberately underproduced. Kill Rock Stars returns. E=6 streak breaks. v1.49.348.

location.formative: Seattle punk scene. Olympia lo-fi tradition (Beat Happening, GBV). Kill Rock Stars lineage.
location.career: Wimps. 2010s. Kill Rock Stars. Lo-fi punk.

theory_nodes.concept: E=6 streak breaks at 207 -- four consecutive E=6 (203-206) ends. Wimps' E=5 resets the energy curve. The lo-fi buffer between listener and maximum impact.
theory_nodes.description: E=6 streak breaks. Four entries at max, then E=5 reset. The engine breathes.

genealogy.relationship: Wimps at 207. E=5 breaks the streak.

theory_nodes.concept: Kill Rock Stars returns -- Olympia-born label (1991). Bikini Kill, Sleater-Kinney, Elliott Smith. Different lineage from Sub Pop: riot grrrl rather than grunge heir.
examples: Bikini Kill, Sleater-Kinney, Elliott Smith, The Decemberists.
After Sub Pop dominance (200-206), label axis shifts.
theory_nodes.description: Kill Rock Stars returns. Olympia lineage. Label axis shifts from Sub Pop.

genealogy.relationship: Wimps at 207. Kill Rock Stars re-enters engine.

theory_nodes.concept: Lo-fi as aesthetic commitment -- deliberately rough production. Not budget limitation but artistic choice. GBV, Beat Happening, Wimps. Imperfections are features.
examples: Guided By Voices: four-track recordings, tape hiss as texture.
Beat Happening: minimal production, maximum sincerity.
Wimps: hooks buried in distortion. Pop under punk under lo-fi.
The room is in the recording.
theory_nodes.description: Lo-fi as commitment. Rough production by choice. Imperfections as features.

genealogy.relationship: Wimps at 207. Lo-fi punk. Hooks in distortion.

cross_references.relationship: E=6 to E=5. Blues rock to lo-fi punk. Sub Pop to Kill Rock Stars. Energy steps down. Label shifts.
Both punk. Childbirth: raw feminist garage (E=6). Wimps: lo-fi catchy punk (E=5). Different punk energies.
E=6 streak began here. Pop-punk brightness. Wimps ends the streak. Bookends.
DETERRENCE! Lo-fi deters polish-seekers. Quills deter predators. Both unappealing to wrong audience.
